title: paraphlomis rugosa
intro: Paraphlomis rugosa, also known as the "Prairie Balm" or "Prairie Sage", is a perennial herb native to North America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Paraphlomis rugosa include its ability to relieve respiratory issues, such as coughs and colds, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve cardiovascular health. The plant can be prepared into various herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
